card.name: Deyinak Silverwood, Director
card.text: Whenever you cast a Saga spell, create a 1/1 white Performer creature token. Whenever you sacrifice an enchantment, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Portia, Top Bill Actress
card.text: Flying, vigilance Portia gets +1/+1 for each Saga you control and each Saga card in your graveyard. Whenever Portia enters or attacks, for each Saga you control, you may remove a lore counter from that Saga or put a lore counter on it.

card.name: Be Kind, Rewind
card.text: Return target Saga card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Exile Be Kind, Rewind. Overload {4}{W}{W}{W} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

card.name: D'Zzik, Underworld Distributor
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever you sacrifice an enchantment, return up to one target enchantment, Bard, or Performer card with lesser mana value from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Dotty Ablis, Beloved Actress
card.text: Enchantment spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. They cost {2} less to cast instead if they have an enchantment type. (Aura, Saga, and Shrine are examples of enchantment types.) Whenever you cast your first enchantment spell each turn, draw a card and put a +1/+1 counter on Dotty Ablis.

card.name: Dila Fauch, Traditionalist
card.text: Whenever you attack with one or more other creatures with power 4 or greater, the next noncreature spell you cast this turn costs {2} less to cast. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell with mana value 4 or greater for the first time each turn, untap each nonland permanent you control.

card.name: Reba, Dancing Bear
card.text: Vigilance, trample Whenever an opponent casts a spell during your turn, Reba deals damage equal to her power to that player. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell with mana value 4 or greater, put two +1/+1 counters on Reba.

card.name: Toki, Script Archivist
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library at any time. You may cast noncreature spells with mana value 4 or greater from the top of your library. When you cast a spell this way, surveil 2.

card.name: Powerful Soliloquy
card.text: Cascade (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.) Noncreature spells you cast from your hand with mana value 4 or greater have cascade.

card.name: The Voughts, Legacy Act
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell with mana value 4 or greater, create a 3/2 green Elf Performer creature token. Then if you control five or more Performers, draw a card.

card.name: Set Teardown
card.text: Organize 4—{2}{G}{G} (You may cast this spell by paying {2}{G}{G} and tapping four creatures you control.) Exile each artifact, enchantment, and nonbasic land you don't control. For each land exiled this way, its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Union Meeting
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to one or more players, you may put a permanent card with mana value X or less from your hand onto the battlefield, where X is the number of lands you control.

card.name: Domesticated Shipbreaker
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 blue Tentacle Performer creature token. Tap four untapped Performers you control: The next instant or sorcery spell you cast from your hand this turn has rebound. (Exile that spell as it resolves. At the beginning of your next upkeep, you may cast that spell from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Harsh Director
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice an enchantment, each opponent loses 3 life unless that player discards a card or sacrifices a nonland permanent. {T}, Pay 2 life: Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Luxurious Geode
card.text: {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {3}{W}{B}, {T}: Choose two permanent cards in your graveyard that share a card type. Put one of them on top of your library, then exile the other. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Glittering Geode
card.text: {T}: Add {U} or {R}. {3}{U}{R}, {T}: Look at the top three cards of your library. You may discard a card. If you do, put two of those cards into your hand. Otherwise put one of those cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Negatives Cutter
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost.

card.name: Returned Thespian
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 1 life. You gain 1 life and surveil 1. Whenever you sacrifice another enchantment, you may pay {B}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
